caption: A person holds a baseball card featuring a player named Jim Rice, which is signed and numbered "17/30". The card is displayed against a background featuring a orange and blue graphic with palm trees and the text "JASPYS LIVE" and "CASEBREAKS.COM". In the background, a man wearing a dark blue shirt and glasses sits at a desk with electronic equipment, appearing in a small inset video window. The person holding the card moves it across the frame, eventually sliding it into a clear plastic protective sleeve. The surrounding environment includes a desk with a white box and other equipment. The "JASPYS LIVE" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" logos remain consistent across the frames, while the position of the card and the hand holding it shift as the card is placed into the sleeve.
